member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Core.Audio.PlayMusic(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Play a music track, automatically fading out the old track with the configured values.
member.param: The song file name to start playing. A blank filename will only stop the currently playing music track.
The time (in ms) it should take to fade in the new music track.
The time (in ms) it should take to fade out the current music track.
Determines whether the song loops once it's over or not.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Core.Audio.StartMusic(System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Start playing a new music track.
member.param: The song file name to start playing.
The time (in ms) it should take to fade in the new music track.
Determines whether the song loops once it's over or not.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Core.Audio.StopMusic(System.Int32)
member.summary: Stops the current playing music track.
member.param: The time (in ms) it should take to fade out the current music track.

member.name: T:Intersect.Client.Core.ClientContext
member.summary: Implements .

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Core.Graphics.ConvertToWorldPoint(System.Numerics.Vector2)
member.summary: Convert a position on the screen to a position on the actual map for rendering.
member.param: The point to convert.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Core.Graphics.ConvertToWorldPointNoZoom(System.Numerics.Vector2)
member.summary: Converts a point in the window to its place in the world view without respecting zoom
member.param: The point to convert.

member.summary: Renders a specified texture onto a RenderTexture or the GameScreen (if renderTarget is passed as null) at the coordinates given using a specified blending mode.
member.param: The texture to draw
X coordinate on the render target to draw to
Y coordinate on the render target to draw to
Where to draw to. If null it this will draw to the game screen.
Which blend mode to use when rendering
Which shader to use when rendering
How much to rotate the texture in degrees
If true, the texture will be drawn immediately. If false, it will be queued for drawing.

member.summary: Renders a specified texture onto a RenderTexture or the GameScreen (if renderTarget is passed as null) at the coordinates given using a specified blending mode.
member.param: The texture to draw
X coordinate on the render target to draw to
Y coordinate on the render target to draw to
Color mask to draw with. Default is Color.White
Where to draw to. If null it this will draw to the game screen.
Which blend mode to use when rendering
Which shader to use when rendering
How much to rotate the texture in degrees
If true, the texture will be drawn immediately. If false, it will be queued for drawing.

member.summary: Renders a specified texture onto a RenderTexture or the GameScreen (if renderTarget is passed as null) at the coordinates given using a specified blending mode.
member.param: The texture to draw
X coordinate on the renderTarget to draw to.
Y coordinate on the renderTarget to draw to.
X coordinate on the source texture to grab from.
Y coordinate on the source texture to grab from.
Width of the texture part we are rendering.
Height of the texture part we are rendering.
>Where to draw to. If null it this will draw to the game screen.
Which blend mode to use when rendering
Which shader to use when rendering
How much to rotate the texture in degrees
If true, the texture will be drawn immediately. If false, it will be queued for drawing.

member.name: T:Intersect.Client.Core.Program
member.summary: The main class.

member.summary: The main entry point for the application.

member.name: P:Intersect.Client.Entities.Entity.IsStealthed
member.summary: Returns whether this entity is Stealthed or not.

member.name: P:Intersect.Client.Entities.Entity.ShouldDraw
member.summary: Returns whether this entity should be drawn.

member.name: P:Intersect.Client.Entities.Entity.ShouldDrawName
member.summary: Returns whether the name of this entity should be drawn.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Entity.DrawEquipment(System.String,Intersect.Color)
member.summary: Draws the equipment of entities using paperdoll texture files.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Entity.DirectionToTarget(Intersect.Client.Entities.Entity)

summary.para: Returns the direction to a player's selected target.
Original logic made by Daywalkr (Middle Ages: Online), thanks for sharing!
Modified by Arufonsu for the Intersect Engine along with support for 8 directions when enabled.

member.param: entity's target

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Entity.IsTileBlocked(Intersect.Point,System.Int32,System.Guid,Intersect.Client.Framework.Entities.IEntity@,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns -6 if the tile is blocked by a global (non-event) entity Returns -5 if the tile is completely out of bounds. Returns -4 if a tile is blocked because of a local event. Returns -3 if a tile is blocked because of a Z dimension tile Returns -2 if a tile does not exist or is blocked by a map attribute. Returns -1 is a tile is passable. Returns any value zero or greater matching the entity index that is in the way.

member.name: P:Intersect.Client.Entities.Player.Guild
member.summary: Name of our guild if we are in one.

member.name: P:Intersect.Client.Entities.Player.Rank
member.summary: Index of our rank where 0 is the leader

member.name: P:Intersect.Client.Entities.Player.IsInGuild
member.summary: Returns whether or not we are in a guild by checking to see if we are assigned a guild name

member.name: P:Intersect.Client.Entities.Player.GuildRank
member.summary: Obtains our rank and permissions from the game config

member.name: F:Intersect.Client.Entities.Player.GuildMembers
member.summary: Contains a record of all members of this player's guild.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Player.TryStoreItemInBank(System.Int32,Intersect.Client.Framework.Items.IItem,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Attempts to deposit the item from the inventory into the bank.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Player.TryRetrieveItemFromBank(System.Int32,Intersect.Client.Framework.Items.IItem,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Attempts to withdraw items from the bank into the inventory.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Player.TryPickupItem(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Guid,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Attempts to pick up an item at the specified location.
member.param: The Id of the map we are trying to loot from.
The index of the tile we are trying to loot from.
The Unique Id of the specific item we want to pick up, leave to not specificy an item and pick up the first thing we can find.
Defines whether we only want to pick up the first item we can find when true, or all items when false.
member.returns: Whether the action was successful or not

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Player.CalculateAttackTime(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculate the attack time for the player as if they have a specified speed stat.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.#ctor(System.Guid,Intersect.Network.Packets.Server.ProjectileEntityPacket)
member.summary: The constructor for the inherated projectile class

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes of the resources used by this instance, preventing any further use.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.FindSpawnAnimationData
member.summary: Determines the appropriate animation data index for the current spawn wave of the projectile. This method iterates through the available animations defined in the projectile's base configuration, selecting the one whose spawn range encompasses the current quantity of spawns.
member.returns: The index of the animation data to use for the current spawn wave.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.AddProjectileSpawns
member.summary: Adds projectile spawns based on predefined spawn locations and directions.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.FindProjectileRotation(Intersect.Enums.Direction,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Finds the projectile rotation value based on the direction, position and the axis.
member.param: The direction of the projectile.
The x-coordinate value.
The y-coordinate value.
True for horizontal (X-axis), false for vertical (Y-axis) calculation.
member.returns: The rotation value for the specified axis based on the direction.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.GetRange(Intersect.Enums.Direction,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates the projectile range based on the given direction, range, and axis.
member.param: The direction of the projectile.
The range of the projectile.
True for horizontal (X-axis), false for vertical (Y-axis) calculation.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.GetDisplacement(System.Int64)
member.summary: Gets the displacement of the projectile during projection
member.returns: The displacement from the co-ordinates if placed on a Options.Instance.Map.TileHeight grid.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.Update
member.summary: Overwrite updating the offsets for projectile movement.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.GetProjectileOffset(Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.ProjectileSpawns,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates the offset for the projectile spawn position based on the target map and spawn location.
member.param: The projectile spawn information.
True for horizontal (X-axis), false for vertical (Y-axis) calculation.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.GetProjectileLerping(Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.ProjectileSpawns,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates the interpolated (lerped) position value for a projectile along the X or Y axis.
member.param: The spawn information of the projectile, including its initial position and spawn time.
True for horizontal (X-axis), false for vertical (Y-axis) calculation.
member.returns: The interpolated position value for the projectile on the specified axis, taking into account the projectile's travel direction, speed, and elapsed time since spawning.
member.remarks: This method determines the projectile's current position by interpolating between its initial offset and its desired position at the current time. It calculates the direction and magnitude of the projectile's movement, normalizes this to obtain a unit vector in the direction of movement, and then applies linear interpolation based on the elapsed time since the projectile was spawned. The interpolation factor is clamped to ensure that the projectile does not overshoot its target position.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.SetProjectileRotation(Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.ProjectileSpawns)
member.summary: Sets the rotation of a projectile based on its spawn information.
member.param: The spawn information of the projectile, including its current animation state and position.
member.remarks: This method calculates the angle between the projectile's current position and its target, converting the angle from radians to degrees and adjusting it by 90 degrees to align with the game's coordinate system. The calculated angle is then applied to the projectile's animation state to visually orient the projectile towards its target.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.CheckForCollision
member.summary: Checks for collision of the projectile with other entities or map boundaries.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.AdjustPositionOnMapBoundaries(System.Single@,System.Single@,Intersect.Client.Maps.MapInstance@)
member.summary: Adjusts the position of a projectile on the map boundaries, potentially changing its map instance.
member.param: The new x-coordinate of the projectile.
The new y-coordinate of the projectile.
The map instance where the projectile is spawned. This may be updated if the projectile crosses map boundaries.
member.remarks: This method checks if the projectile crosses the boundaries of its current map. If it does, it attempts to move the projectile to the adjacent map in the direction it crossed the boundary. This includes handling corner cases where the projectile crosses at the corners of the map, potentially moving it diagonally to a new map. The new position of the projectile is adjusted to visually reflect its entry point into the adjacent map.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.Collided(System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines if a projectile spawn has collided with an entity, resource, or map block.
member.param: The index of the projectile spawn in the _spawns array.
member.returns: True if the projectile spawn has collided and should be destroyed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.Entities.Projectiles.Projectile.Draw
member.summary: Rendering all of the individual projectiles from a singular spawn to a map.

member.summary: This is used to prevent the client from showing unnecessary disconnect messages

member.name: T:Intersect.Client.MonoGame.IntersectGame
member.summary: This is the main type for your game.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.MonoGame.IntersectGame.Initialize
member.summary: Allows the game to perform any initialization it needs to before starting to run. This is where it can query for any required services and load any non-graphic related content. Calling base.Initialize will enumerate through any components and initialize them as well.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.MonoGame.IntersectGame.Update(Microsoft.Xna.Framework.GameTime)
member.summary: Allows the game to run logic such as updating the world, checking for collisions, gathering input, and playing audio.
member.param: Provides a snapshot of timing values.

member.name: M:Intersect.Client.MonoGame.IntersectGame.Draw(Microsoft.Xna.Framework.GameTime)
member.summary: This is called when the game should draw itself.
member.param: Provides a snapshot of timing values.
